_meta.title: HUQAN Demo Verify Results
_meta.description: Sample verify() outputs from the demo graph. Each entry shows claim, deterministic verdict (dogrulandi/celiski/bilinmiyor), confidence, and evidence trail.
_meta.note: Same input → same output. Every time. No probability, no guessing, no hallucination.

verifications.note: Supported by graph edge with confidence 0.90.

verifications.evidence: type_conflict: kedi --[tür]--> hayvan contradicts claim that kedi is plant (hayvan != bitki)
verifications.note: Type-lattice conflict detected. The graph knows kedi is animal, so claiming it is plant is a contradiction.

verifications.evidence: no_matching_edge: no edge from mars or ucak to tastir found
verifications.note: No graph evidence found. Deterministic unknown verdict — does not hallucinate.
Turkish-language graph edge directly supports the claim.
